author: Jdthomas24
description: Advanced Hubitat battery monitoring with analytics, trends and replacement tracking. Recurring scan schedule, confidence-weighted health, EWMA smoothing.
releaseNotes: v2.4.24 - New: OAuth web portal — live battery dashboard accessible from any browser via cloud or local URL. New: Device Battery Management page — assign battery types, log manual replacements, reset drain history, and view per-device replacement history all in one place. Consolidated Battery Catalog into Device Management. Legacy catalog entries auto-migrate on update. No data loss.
